creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Thu, 01 May 2014 15:16:30 +0200 FreeBSD@nagilum.org wrote:
> No change.
> Although disabling GSSAPI resolves a similar error in curl (which can  
> also be fixed by reordering the -L arguments) it does nothing for  
> raptor2.

I've attached a new patch for curl, because I think the HEIMDAL_PORT
option currently doesn't work correctly.
